title: iris gueldenstaedtiana var. sogdiana
intro: Iris gueldenstaedtiana var. sogdiana, also known as the Sogdian iris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family and is native to Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Iris gueldenstaedtiana var. sogdiana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are commonly used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or applied topically to the affected area.
